input_text: Kita kena halau semua pendatang dari kampung ni sebelum diorang ambil alih tanah kita. Bakar rumah sewa diorang kalau perlu!
reason: Explicit call to arson and forced expulsion of migrants from a neighborhood, constituting direct incitement to violence and property destruction.
suggested_rewrite: Saya bimbang tentang isu pemilikan tanah di kampung kita. Mungkin kita boleh bawa perkara ini kepada pihak berkuasa tanah atau wakil rakyat untuk penyelesaian yang sah.

input_text: This Hindu temple near my house is so noisy every morning. We should demolish it and build a parking lot. Who's with me?
reason: Calling for demolition of a religious place of worship is severe religious provocation and incitement to property destruction.
suggested_rewrite: The temple near my house can be quite loud in the mornings. I'd like to discuss noise management options with the temple committee or local council.

input_text: Aku ada nombor telefon, alamat rumah dan tempat kerja cikgu tu. Jom kita pergi ramai-ramai ajar dia pengajaran yang dia takkan lupa!
reason: Full doxxing threat combined with organized mob intimidation against a teacher, threatening physical confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada masalah dengan guru tersebut, kita boleh membuat aduan rasmi kepada pihak sekolah atau Jabatan Pendidikan untuk siasatan yang sewajarnya.

input_text: 那个马来档口的食物肯定不干净的，他们都不洗手。大家千万不要去吃，去了肯定会中毒死掉！
reason: Dangerous false health claims targeting Malay food vendors with ethnic stereotyping, claiming their food will cause fatal poisoning.
suggested_rewrite: 如果对某个档口的卫生有疑虑，可以向地方卫生部门反映，让他们进行检查。不应该以种族来判断食物的卫生标准。

input_text: இந்த நாட்டில் தமிழர்களுக்கு எந்த உரிமையும் இல்லை. நாம் ஒன்றிணைந்து அரசாங்க கட்டிடங்களை தீ வைக்க வேண்டும்!
reason: Incites arson against government buildings framed as ethnic grievance, constituting direct incitement to violence and destruction of public property.
suggested_rewrite: தமிழர்களின் உரிமைகள் குறித்து கவலைகள் இருந்தால், சட்டப்பூர்வ வழிகளில் குரல் எழுப்பலாம். சட்டமன்ற பிரதிநிதிகள் அல்லது மனித உரிமை ஆணையத்தை அணுகலாம்.

input_text: Semua orang Cina ni memang pencuri, dari nenek moyang lagi dah curi tanah kita. Masa untuk kita rampas balik semua harta diorang!
reason: Dehumanizing racial slur against Chinese Malaysians with explicit call to seize their property, constituting incitement to theft and communal violence.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pemilikan tanah dan harta adalah perkara kompleks yang memerlukan perbincangan berdasarkan fakta sejarah dan undang-undang, bukan tuduhan perkauman.

input_text: Share this guy's IC number and home address - he insulted Islam online. Let's go to his house tonight and make him regret it forever.
reason: Full doxxing with identity card number, combined with explicit threat of physical violence at someone's home.
suggested_rewrite: If someone has posted content that insults Islam, you can report it to MCMC or the police for investigation under the relevant laws.

input_text: Kalau kerajaan tak tukar, kita kena turunkan sendiri. Bawa parang, bawa apa saja. Masa untuk revolusi berdarah!
reason: Explicit call for armed revolution and bloodshed against the government, inciting violence with weapons.
suggested_rewrite: Jika tidak berpuas hati dengan kerajaan, kita boleh menyuarakan pandangan melalui pilihan raya, petisyen, atau demonstrasi aman yang sah di sisi undang-undang.

input_text: 我知道那个印度人律师住在哪里。今晚我们一起去他家泼红漆，让他知道得罪我们华人的下场！
reason: Doxxing combined with organized vandalism targeting an Indian lawyer based on ethnicity, constituting hate crime planning.
suggested_rewrite: 如果对律师的服务有任何不满，可以向律师公会投诉或寻求法律途径解决。不应该采取任何违法行为。

input_text: Jom kita boycott dan serang semua kedai mamak area ni. Diorang bukan rakyat Malaysia pun, hantar balik semua ke India!
reason: Calls for physical attacks on mamak restaurants and deportation of an entire community, constituting ethnic violence incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kebimbangan tentang status imigresen peniaga di kawasan anda, perkara ini boleh dilaporkan kepada Jabatan Imigresen untuk tindakan mengikut undang-undang.

input_text: That Malay ustaz touched my daughter. I'm going to kill him tonight. Already sharpened my knife. Share his location if you know.
reason: Explicit death threat with premeditated weapon preparation and request for victim's location, constituting planned murder.
suggested_rewrite: If your daughter has been harmed, immediately file a police report and contact the welfare department. They have trained officers who will investigate and protect your family.

input_text: Saya nak viralkan gambar anak dia yang bawah umur ni supaya semua orang tahu muka keluarga pengkhianat bangsa ni!
reason: Threatening to expose and virally share images of a minor child as a form of revenge against their parent, violating child privacy and safety.
suggested_rewrite: Anak-anak tidak sepatutnya dilibatkan dalam pertikaian orang dewasa. Jika ada isu dengan seseorang, selesaikan secara dewasa tanpa melibatkan keluarga mereka.

input_text: 这些巫裔根本就是寄生虫，靠政府养活。我们应该把他们全部赶出吉隆坡！
reason: Dehumanizing Malay community as parasites and calling for their expulsion from KL, severe racial hatred and incitement.
suggested_rewrite: 关于政府援助政策的讨论应该基于事实和数据，而不是针对任何族群的偏见。每个社区都有自己的贡献和挑战。

input_text: Korang tau tak rumah Ahli Parlimen tu kat mana? Jom pergi malam ni, baling batu kat tingkap dia. Bagi pengajaran!
reason: Organizing mob attack on a parliamentarian's home with stone-throwing, constituting planned violence against a public official.
suggested_rewrite: Jika tidak berpuas hati dengan wakil rakyat, anda boleh menulis surat rasmi, menghadiri sesi dialog, atau mengundi calon lain pada pilihan raya akan datang.

input_text: அந்த சீன பள்ளியை மூட வேண்டும். அங்கு படிக்கும் குழந்தைகளை எல்லாம் வெளியே இழுத்து வீசுவோம்!
reason: Calling for forcible closure of Chinese schools and physical violence against schoolchildren, targeting children based on ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: கல்வி கொள்கை பற்றிய கவலைகள் இருந்தால், கல்வி அமைச்சகத்திடம் முறையாக தெரிவிக்கலாம். அனைத்து குழந்தைகளின் பாதுகாப்பும் முக்கியம்.

input_text: Eh share la alamat rumah budak yang viral cakap buruk pasal Agong tu. Kita pergi serbu rumah dia ramai-ramai!
reason: Requesting doxxing information and organizing mob attack on someone's home over online speech, constituting vigilante violence.
suggested_rewrite: Penghinaan terhadap institusi diraja boleh dilaporkan kepada polis untuk siasatan di bawah undang-undang yang berkaitan. Jangan ambil tindakan sendiri.

input_text: All Indian workers in this factory are thieves. I've installed hidden cameras in their lockers and changing rooms. Will upload the footage online.
reason: Racial profiling combined with illegal surveillance in private spaces (changing rooms) and threatened distribution of intimate footage.
suggested_rewrite: If you suspect theft in your workplace, install security cameras in common areas with proper notice to employees, and report incidents to police with evidence.

input_text: Kita dah senaraikan 50 nama orang yang sokong parti pembangkang. Esok kita mula bakar kereta diorang satu persatu!
reason: Creating a hit list of political opponents and planning systematic arson of their vehicles, constituting organized political violence.
suggested_rewrite: Dalam demokrasi, orang berhak menyokong mana-mana parti. Perbezaan politik tidak sepatutnya membawa kepada keganasan. Hormati hak setiap rakyat untuk bersuara.

input_text: 华人开的店都卖假货毒药，去吃了会死人的！赶快转发让所有马来人知道不要去光顾！
reason: Spreading dangerous false claims that Chinese-owned shops sell poison/fake goods that will kill people, inciting ethnic boycott based on fabricated health threat.
suggested_rewrite: 如果怀疑任何商店出售假冒或不安全产品，应向贸消部或卫生部投报，让相关部门进行调查。不应以族群来判断商品质量。

input_text: Neighbor complaint la. That Bangla family next door - I already poured acid on their doorstep. Next time I pour on them directly!
reason: Admission of acid attack on property with explicit threat of acid attack on persons, constituting grievous bodily harm threat.
suggested_rewrite: If you have issues with your neighbors, please speak to your housing management or local council. For serious disputes, mediation services are available.

input_text: Diorang ni nak Islamkan semua orang. Jom kita bakar surau yang baru dibina tu sebagai amaran!
reason: Calling for arson of a mosque/surau as a warning against perceived Islamization, constituting religious hate crime incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kebimbangan tentang pembinaan rumah ibadat, anda boleh menyuarakan pandangan melalui saluran rasmi majlis perbandaran atau wakil rakyat.

input_text: I have the personal details of every DAP member in Penang. Names, addresses, children's schools. One more provocation and I release everything.
reason: Mass doxxing threat including children's school locations, weaponizing personal data of political party members.
suggested_rewrite: Political disagreements should be resolved through democratic processes. Threatening to expose personal details, especially of children, is a serious criminal offense.

input_text: Semua guru perempuan yang tak pakai tudung patut dipecat dan dihukum sebat di khalayak ramai!
reason: Calling for public corporal punishment of women based on religious dress code, constituting gender-based violence advocacy.
suggested_rewrite: Pilihan berpakaian adalah hak peribadi setiap individu. Guru dinilai berdasarkan kualiti pengajaran mereka, bukan penampilan peribadi.

input_text: 那些印度佬的庙每天早上那么吵，我已经买了汽油，今晚就去烧掉它！谁要一起来？
reason: Planning arson of a Hindu temple with premeditated purchase of gasoline, recruiting accomplices for religious hate crime.
suggested_rewrite: 如果对附近寺庙的噪音有意见，可以向地方政府或环境部门投诉。他们会协调解决噪音问题。

input_text: Lepas ni kalau nampak budak Myanmar kat kawasan kita, tangkap dan pukul sampai diorang tak berani datang lagi!
reason: Inciting kidnapping and assault of Myanmar refugees/migrants, organizing vigilante violence against a vulnerable community.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pendatang tanpa izin boleh dilaporkan kepada pihak imigresen untuk tindakan mengikut undang-undang. Keganasan terhadap sesiapa adalah jenayah.

input_text: I'm organizing a group to go slash the tires and smash the windows of every car with a Chinese surname sticker in our taman.
reason: Organizing racially-targeted property destruction against Chinese residents in a residential area.
suggested_rewrite: If you have concerns about your neighborhood, raise them at the residents' association meeting. Vandalism based on ethnicity is a serious crime.

input_text: இந்த மசூதியின் ஒலிபெருக்கி மிகவும் சத்தமாக உள்ளது. நாம் அதை உடைத்து தரையில் போடுவோம்!
reason: Calling for destruction of mosque loudspeaker equipment, constituting vandalism of religious property.
suggested_rewrite: மசூதி ஒலிபெருக்கி பற்றிய கவலைகள் இருந்தால், உள்ளூர் அதிகாரிகள் அல்லது மசூதி நிர்வாகத்திடம் முறையாக தெரிவிக்கலாம்.

input_text: Sebar gambar isteri dia yang tak bertudung ni kat group WhatsApp. Biar semua orang tahu betapa hina keluarga dia!
reason: Non-consensual sharing of a woman's photos to shame her family based on religious dress standards, constituting harassment and privacy violation.
suggested_rewrite: Cara berpakaian seseorang adalah pilihan peribadi. Menyebarkan gambar orang tanpa kebenaran untuk mempermalukan mereka adalah salah dan mungkin melanggar undang-undang.

input_text: Don't trust any Malay doctor at government hospitals. They deliberately give wrong medicine to non-Malays. Several Chinese patients already died!
reason: Fabricating claims of deliberate medical malpractice targeting non-Malay patients, extremely dangerous health misinformation that could cause people to avoid medical treatment.
suggested_rewrite: If you have concerns about medical treatment, file a complaint with the hospital administration or the Malaysian Medical Council. All doctors are bound by professional ethics regardless of background.

input_text: Kita patut bunuh semua orang yang menghina Nabi. Takde kompromi, takde mahkamah, terus bunuh!
reason: Explicit call for extrajudicial killing of those perceived to insult the Prophet, bypassing all legal process.
suggested_rewrite: Penghinaan terhadap agama boleh dilaporkan kepada polis untuk siasatan di bawah undang-undang yang berkaitan. Proses undang-undang wujud untuk menangani perkara sebegini.

input_text: 我们要把所有马来学生从华校赶出去！他们不配在我们的学校读书！
reason: Calling for ethnic expulsion of Malay students from Chinese schools, denying education based on race.
suggested_rewrite: 华校欢迎所有族群的学生。多元文化的学习环境能促进国民团结和相互理解。如果有任何教育政策的疑问，可向教育部咨询。

input_text: Jom serbu kilang tu malam ni. Bawa besi, bawa apa saja. Pekerja asing yang curi kerja kita semua kena belasah!
reason: Organizing armed mob attack on a factory to assault foreign workers, explicit incitement to mass violence.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kebimbangan tentang pekerja asing tanpa permit, laporkan kepada Jabatan Tenaga Kerja atau Imigresen. Mereka bertanggungjawab untuk menguatkuasakan undang-undang buruh.

input_text: Everyone share this: the water supply in Shah Alam has been poisoned by Hindus who threw dead animals into the reservoir. DON'T DRINK THE WATER!
reason: Fabricated water contamination panic blaming Hindu community, could cause mass panic and communal violence.
suggested_rewrite: If you have concerns about water quality, check official announcements from Syabas/Air Selangor or contact them directly. Don't spread unverified claims that could cause panic.

input_text: Kita ada senarai semua keluarga Syiah di Selangor. Masa untuk bertindak. Halau diorang dari negeri kita!
reason: Creating a persecutory list of Shia families and calling for their expulsion from the state, constituting organized religious persecution.
suggested_rewrite: Perbezaan mazhab dalam Islam adalah perkara yang ditangani oleh pihak berkuasa agama negeri. Bukan tugas orang awam untuk mengambil tindakan sendiri terhadap mana-mana kumpulan.

input_text: 那个马来女孩和华人男生交往，我们要教训她！把她的照片和地址发出来，让所有人知道她的丑事！
reason: Doxxing and threatening violence against a woman for interracial dating, combined with honor-based harassment.
suggested_rewrite: 每个人都有自由选择自己的伴侣。散布他人私人信息和照片是违法行为，应尊重他人的隐私和个人选择。

input_text: Aku dah letak paku kat jalan masuk gereja tu. Biar tayar kereta diorang semua pancit. Padan muka Kristian!
reason: Admitting to sabotage targeting churchgoers by placing nails on the road, endangering lives and targeting Christians.
suggested_rewrite: Merosakkan harta benda dan membahayakan keselamatan orang lain adalah jenayah serius tanpa mengira agama mereka. Jika ada isu dengan gereja, bincang dengan pihak berkuasa tempatan.

input_text: All Bangladeshi workers smell terrible and carry diseases. We should round them up and dump them at the border. They're not human.
reason: Dehumanizing foreign workers as disease carriers and calling for forced deportation, denying their humanity.
suggested_rewrite: Concerns about worker welfare and hygiene should be addressed through proper channels like the Labor Department. All workers deserve to be treated with basic human dignity.

input_text: இந்த ஊரில் உள்ள அனைத்து சீன கடைகளையும் கொள்ளையடிப்போம்! அவர்கள் நம் பணத்தை திருடுகிறார்கள்!
reason: Inciting organized robbery and looting of Chinese-owned shops, constituting ethnic violence and property crime.
suggested_rewrite: வணிக நடைமுறைகள் குறித்து ஏதேனும் சட்ட மீறல்கள் இருந்தால், நுகர்வோர் பாதுகாப்பு அமைப்பிடம் புகார் அளிக்கலாம்.

input_text: Forward cepat - bomoh tu dah buat sihir kat bekalan air Johor. Kalau tak percaya tengok air keruh tu. Jangan minum! Diorang nak racun orang Islam!
reason: Fabricating a supernatural water poisoning conspiracy targeting Muslims, combining dangerous health misinformation with religious panic.
suggested_rewrite: Jika air kelihatan keruh, ia mungkin disebabkan oleh kerja-kerja penyelenggaraan paip. Semak laman web Syarikat Air Johor untuk pengumuman rasmi. Jangan sebarkan maklumat yang tidak disahkan.

input_text: We caught the snatch thief - he's Indonesian. Let's hang him from the bridge as a warning to all pendatang. No police needed!
reason: Calling for extrajudicial killing by public hanging of a suspected criminal based on nationality, extreme vigilante justice.
suggested_rewrite: If you've caught a snatch thief, hand them over to the police immediately. Vigilante justice is a serious crime and endangers everyone.

input_text: Sesiapa yang jumpa anak perempuan dia, tolong tangkap dan kurung. Dia dah lari dari rumah sebab nak kahwin bukan Islam. Kita tak boleh biarkan!
reason: Calling for kidnapping and false imprisonment of an adult woman over her relationship choices, constituting organized abduction.
suggested_rewrite: Keputusan peribadi anak dewasa perlu dihormati. Jika ada kebimbangan keluarga, dapatkan nasihat kaunselor keluarga atau pemimpin agama secara peribadi.

input_text: 这些印度人的神像太丑了，我们应该把它们全部砸碎丢进河里！让他们知道谁才是老大！
reason: Calling for destruction of Hindu religious statues, severe desecration of sacred objects intended to provoke communal conflict.
suggested_rewrite: 每个宗教的神像和象征物都应受到尊重。如果对公共空间的宗教物品有意见，可以通过地方政府的正式渠道表达。

input_text: Aku nak share video seks cikgu tu yang aku record secara rahsia. Biar habis kerjaya dia. Siapa nak, PM aku.
reason: Threatening to distribute secretly recorded intimate content without consent, constituting revenge pornography and criminal privacy violation.
suggested_rewrite: Merakam dan menyebarkan video intim tanpa kebenaran adalah jenayah serius di bawah undang-undang Malaysia. Jika ada aduan terhadap guru, gunakan saluran rasmi.

input_text: BREAKING: Confirmed cases of cholera at the Indian temple food distribution. 5 already dead. DON'T EAT THEIR FOOD. Share before they delete this!
reason: Fabricating a deadly disease outbreak at a temple to create health panic and religious hostility, with fake death toll.
suggested_rewrite: If you hear about a disease outbreak, verify with the Ministry of Health before sharing. Spreading false health information can cause serious harm and is a criminal offense.

input_text: Malam ni operasi kita. Masuk asrama pekerja Bangladesh tu dan buang semua barang diorang ke longkang. Kalau diorang lawan, belasah!
reason: Planning organized raid on worker dormitory to destroy their belongings and assault them, constituting planned hate crime.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada masalah dengan asrama pekerja di kawasan anda, laporkan kepada pihak berkuasa tempatan atau Jabatan Tenaga Kerja untuk tindakan mengikut undang-undang.

input_text: அந்த மலாய் ஆசிரியர் எங்கள் குழந்தைகளை அடித்தார். நாம் அவரது வீட்டை சூழ்ந்து தீ வைப்போம்!
reason: Organizing arson attack on a teacher's home in retaliation, escalating a school discipline issue into mob violence with ethnic framing.
suggested_rewrite: ஆசிரியர் ஒழுக்கமின்மை குறித்து பள்ளி நிர்வாகம் அல்லது கல்வித் துறையிடம் முறையான புகார் செய்யலாம். வன்முறை சரியான தீர்வு அல்ல.

input_text: Orang Kristian kat Malaysia ni semua murtad dan musuh Islam. Halau diorang dari negara ni atau kita perang!
reason: Declaring all Christians enemies of Islam and threatening war or deportation, extreme religious supremacist incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia adalah negara berbilang agama yang dilindungi oleh Perlembagaan. Setiap rakyat berhak mengamalkan agama masing-masing. Dialog antara agama lebih membina daripada permusuhan.

input_text: I just found out where that blogger lives who criticized our race. Sharing his full address here. Go do what needs to be done.
reason: Doxxing a blogger and implicitly inciting violence at their home for exercising free speech about racial issues.
suggested_rewrite: If a blogger has published content you find offensive, you can report it to MCMC or respond with your own perspective. Sharing someone's address to threaten them is a crime.
